title: Duane Szafron
text: Home * People * Duane Szafron Duane Szafron [1] Duane Allen Szafron , a Canadian mathematician and professor of computing science at University of Alberta , Ph.D. in applied mathematics from the University of Waterloo in 1978 on the topic of inhomogeneous cosmology . He has been doing research in object-oriented computing since 1980, including language design, language implementation, programming environments and parallel computing . His current research interests are in computer games , especially believable characters in computer games and computer poker [2] . It was in winter 1988, when Duane Szafron along with Joe Culberson asked Jonathan Schaeffer the innocent question "Jonathan, what ever happened to computer checkers?" [3] , yielding to the development of Chinook and solving Checkers [4] .
